Our Process

Effortless from start
to delivery.

01
📅
Schedule Your Shoot
Book online or reach out directly to lock in your preferred date and time. We work around your schedule — fast, flexible, and hassle-free.
02
🎬
We Capture the Property
Our team arrives on-site fully equipped. Every angle, every detail, captured with cinematic precision and professional-grade equipment.
03
📥
Receive Your Media
Wake up to polished, market-ready photos and video delivered directly to your inbox the very next morning. Ready to list, ready to share.
Why Choose Us

What makes us
different.

📱
Social Media Is Our Superpower

We create social-ready real estate content optimized for TikTok and Instagram to help listings capture attention and reach more buyers online.

🔥
Viral Vertical Video — Proven to Get Views

Short-form video is one of the most effective tools in modern real estate marketing, helping listings gain attention, increase engagement, and reach more potential buyers online.

"Most agents only list a property. We make it go viral."

The Person Behind the Lens
TAREK ALDAIRI
Videographer & Content Creator

Meet
Tarek Aldairi

"A videographer and social media content creator with years of experience helping brands and businesses stand out online through high-quality visuals and engaging content."

With a background in creating viral content and producing videos that have reached millions of views across social media, Tarek brings a creative and modern approach to real estate media.

His goal is to help properties make a strong first impression through cinematic videos, professional photography, and content designed to capture attention in today's digital world.

What We Offer

Content That
Sells Homes.

We combine cinematic visuals with modern marketing to showcase properties at their absolute best and help attract serious buyers.

01 — Photography

Real Estate Photography

First impressions are everything. Our real estate photography captures every room, every angle, and every outdoor space in rich, true-to-life detail — edited and delivered the next morning, ready for MLS and all your marketing channels.

Interior & Exterior Coverage
Every room, hallway, and outdoor space documented with precise composition and professional lighting.
MLS-Ready Delivery
Images delivered in the exact formats required for MLS upload, social, and print — zero extra steps.
HDR Editing
Sky Replacement Available
All Rooms Included
24-Hour Delivery
02 — Video

Cinematic Video Tours

Fluid, cinematic walkthrough videos engineered to forge an emotional connection and drive listing engagement. Every sequence carefully crafted — dynamic movement, professional color grading, and immersive sound design.

Storytelling First
Carefully crafted sequences that guide the buyer through the home — room by room, emotion by emotion.
Social-Ready Reels
Vertical short-form cuts alongside the MLS video — optimized for TikTok and Instagram.
4K Ultra-HD
Licensed Music
Color Grading
Smooth Transitions
03 — Aerial

Drone Aerial Media

Give buyers the full picture — literally. FAA-compliant aerial drone footage and photography captures the property's scale, surroundings, and neighborhood in a way nothing else can.

Aerial Photography
High-resolution overhead shots showcasing lot size, landscaping, and surrounding neighborhood.
Cinematic Flyovers
Smooth drone video sequences woven into the MLS video — elevating production value from the first frame.
FAA Compliant
4K Aerial Video
All Packages
Extended on Premium
04 — Social Media

Social Media Reels

The most powerful real estate marketing tool right now is short-form vertical video. Every property gets a scroll-stopping Reel with a realtor talking head intro, engineered to go viral on TikTok and Instagram and drive qualified buyers straight to your listing.

Realtor Talking Head Intro
Opens with the agent on camera — building personal brand and creating a human connection with buyers.
Proven to Get Views
Hooks designed to stop the scroll and push reach far beyond your followers.
TikTok & Instagram
Talking Head Included
Scroll-Stopping Hooks
Viral-Ready Format
05 — Floor Plans

Digital Floor Plans

A clean floor plan builds buyer confidence, reduces wasted showings, and positions your listing as thorough and professional. Included in every package — no upsells, no extras.

Included in All Packages
Digital Delivery
MLS Compatible
Accurate Measurements

Add-Ons

Customize Your Package

Every property is unique, which is why all packages can be customized to fit your specific needs. Additional services such as drone footage, cinematic reels, twilight photography, agent walkthroughs, fast turnaround delivery, and social media content can be added to any package for an additional cost. We're happy to tailor each shoot to match your vision, marketing goals, and property style.

⚠ Pricing Disclaimer: Pricing is based on property size and project scope. Homes up to 2,000 sq ft qualify for base pricing, while properties between 2,000–3,500 sq ft and 3,500+ sq ft are subject to adjusted rates. Final pricing may vary depending on location, travel, add-ons, turnaround time, and specific media requests. Please contact us for a custom quote tailored to your property.

Why It Matters

The Power Behind
The Presentation

In today's market, buyers make decisions within seconds. High-quality visual media doesn't just showcase a property — it creates emotional connection, increases engagement, and helps listings stand out in a crowded market.

47%
More Buyer Attention

Listings with professional photography and cinematic video consistently attract more online views, saves, and buyer engagement compared to standard listing content.

2X
Higher Social Engagement

Properties paired with vertical reels and social-first content generate significantly stronger performance across Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook, helping agents expand their reach organically.

Faster
Buyer Interest
Stronger First Impressions

Premium visuals create a stronger emotional response the moment buyers view a listing, increasing urgency and helping properties stand out from competing homes in the area.

Media Designed for Modern Real Estate

From cinematic walkthroughs to vertical social content, every package is built to help agents market smarter, elevate their brand presence, and create listings buyers remember.

Built for Realtors Who Want More Than Just Photos

We create modern real estate media tailored for today's digital market — combining cinematic visuals, social media strategy, and fast turnaround times to help agents stay ahead.

01 — Photography

Real Estate Photography

First impressions are everything. Our real estate photography captures every room, every angle, and every outdoor space in rich, true-to-life detail — edited and delivered the next morning, ready to upload directly to MLS and your marketing channels.

Interior & Exterior Coverage
Every room, hallway, and outdoor space documented with precise composition and professional lighting. Nothing overlooked.
MLS-Ready Delivery
Images delivered in the exact formats required for MLS upload, social media, and print marketing — zero extra steps needed.
HDR Editing
Sky Replacement Available
Same-Day Rush Available
All Rooms Included
02 — Video

Cinematic Video Tours

Fluid, cinematic walkthrough videos engineered to forge an emotional connection and drive listing engagement. We don't just film a home — we tell its story. Every sequence is carefully crafted to guide the buyer through the space with dynamic movement, professional color grading, and immersive sound design.

Storytelling First
Carefully crafted sequences that guide the buyer through the home — room by room, emotion by emotion. Every cut has a purpose.
Social-Ready Vertical Reels
Vertical short-form cuts delivered alongside the MLS video — optimized for TikTok and Instagram to maximize organic reach and drive traffic back to your listing.
4K Ultra-HD Resolution
Licensed High-End Music
Immersive Sound Design
Professional Color Grading
Smooth Cinematic Transitions
03 — Aerial

Drone Aerial Media

Give buyers the full picture — literally. FAA-compliant aerial drone footage and photography captures the property's scale, surroundings, and neighborhood context in a way nothing else can. Sweeping overheads and dynamic flyovers that make every listing feel larger than life.

Aerial Photography
High-resolution overhead and angled shots showcasing the property footprint, lot size, landscaping, and surrounding neighborhood.
Cinematic Flyovers
Smooth drone video sequences woven directly into the MLS video and Reels — elevating production value and buyer perception from the first frame.
FAA Compliant
4K Aerial Video
Included in All Packages
Extended Coverage on Premium
04 — Social Media

Social Media Reels

The most powerful real estate marketing tool right now is short-form vertical video — and we've built our entire workflow around it. Every property gets a scroll-stopping Reel with a realtor talking head intro, engineered to go viral on TikTok and Instagram and drive qualified buyers directly to your listing.

Realtor Talking Head Intro
Opens with the agent on camera — building personal brand, establishing trust, and creating a human connection with potential buyers before they ever step inside.
Proven to Get Views
Vertical video content formatted specifically for TikTok and Instagram Reels, with hooks designed to stop the scroll and algorithms designed to push reach far beyond your followers.
TikTok & Instagram Optimized
Realtor Talking Head
Scroll-Stopping Hooks
Viral-Ready Format
05 — Floor Plans

Digital Floor Plans

A clean, professional floor plan does more than show layout — it builds buyer confidence. Serious buyers want to understand a home before they visit. A floor plan gives them that, reduces wasted showings, and positions your listing as thorough, transparent, and professional.

Accurate & Detailed
Precisely measured digital floor plans showing room dimensions, flow, and layout — everything a buyer needs to visualize the space before stepping inside.
Included in Every Package
Floor plans come standard with all three packages — no upsells, no extras. Every listing deserves this level of presentation.
Included in All Packages
Digital Delivery
MLS Compatible
